items.title: Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Suspended by US Export-Control Directive
items.summary: US BIS export-control directive received 2026-06-12 at 5:21 PM ET. Fable 5 and Mythos 5 disabled globally because Anthropic cannot verify nationality in real time. All other Claude models unaffected. Jailbreak by Pliny the Liberator reportedly triggered complaint, Amazon implicated as source. Anthropic disputes severity.

items.title: Anthropic Agent SDK Billing Split Goes Live
items.source_org: The New Stack (trade press); Anthropic announcement confirmed via multiple outlets
items.summary: Agent SDK, claude -p, Claude Code GitHub Actions, and third-party SDK apps now draw from a separate credit pool at API list rates: $20/Pro, $100/Max-5x, $200/Max-20x. Developer reaction negative; analyses show 12x–175x effective cost increases for heavy agent workloads. Third billing intervention by Anthropic since January 2026.

items.title: DiffusionGemma 26B-A4B Open-Weights Released
items.summary: 26B MoE (3.8B active per step) text-diffusion model generating 256 tokens in parallel per forward pass. Vendor claims >1,000 tok/s on H100 (unverified independently); H200 figure 1,288 tok/s confirmed by vLLM post. Apache 2.0. Available on HF, Kaggle, Vertex AI Model Garden. Quality acknowledged lower than Gemma 4. Speed conditional on low-concurrency deployment.
caveats: Speed advantage collapses under high-throughput batched serving
Lower output quality than comparable Gemma 4 models per Google's own disclosure
H100 and consumer GPU figures are vendor-measured only

items.title: Kimi K2.7 Code by Moonshot AI Released Open-Weight
items.source_org: Moonshot AI (via MarkTechPost — primary vendor blog not retrieved)
items.summary: 1T-parameter MoE (32B active, 384 experts), 256K context, Modified MIT license. API: $0.95/$4.00 per M tokens. Moonshot reports +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2 vs K2.6, 30% fewer reasoning tokens. All benchmarks are proprietary. No SWE-bench Verified, LiveCodeBench, or Terminal-Bench results available.
caveats: All benchmarks proprietary (Kimi Code Bench v2, Program Bench, MLS Bench Lite)
K2.6 scored only 24% on independent DeepSWE benchmark vs high internal scores
Primary Moonshot AI announcement URL not directly fetched

items.title: TCS-Anthropic Global Premier Partnership
items.summary: TCS designated Global Premier Partner in Claude Partner Network. 50,000+ TCS associates to use Claude across 56 countries. Dedicated business unit for regulated industries. Products: insurance claims processing, banking lending advisory. TCS iON will run Claude certification programs (75M annual assessments). Target: financial services, healthcare, aviation, telecoms, medtech.

items.title: DXC Technology to Integrate Claude in Regulated-Industry Systems
items.source_org: Anthropic (news page listing; DXC press release not retrieved)
items.summary: DXC Technology will integrate Claude into mission-critical systems serving banks, airlines, and regulated industries. Scope: core operational infrastructure, not productivity tooling. Announcement confirmed via Anthropic news page June 11; DXC primary release not fetched.

items.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Corps — $150M Nonprofit AI Fellowship
items.summary: $150M commitment. 1,000 fellows at $85K/year placed in US nonprofits for 1 year. First cohort: 100 fellows, applications open until July 17, 2026, starting October. Administered by Anthropic, CodePath, Social Finance. Requirements: US work-authorized, <2 years full-time experience.

items.title: Anthropic Public Record — First Survey Results
items.conflict_of_interest: Anthropic-commissioned survey; methodology disclosed (YouGov, nationally representative quotas)
items.summary: n=51,993 Americans, Nov–Dec 2025. Top fear: AI job displacement (64%, top in every state). Top hope: AI cures major diseases (48%). Institutional trust in AI companies: 15% (lowest tested). Government regulation support: 70%+. Survey period: Nov–Dec 2025 (not June 2026 data).
